codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully introduces session rehydration and silent renewal through refresh rotation. It securely relies on GET /auth/session, adds `fetchWithRenewal` for 401 retry handling, and implements WS reconnection with exponential backoff. The `authexpired` event properly isolates the fallback to guest UI in App.svelte when renewal fails. All security constraints and expected behaviors have been met, along with robust Playwright test coverage.

summary: Passed review. The implementation correctly satisfies VAL-CROSS-004, VAL-CROSS-005, and VAL-CROSS-008.
